pr.title: 4 the Leaderboard: 11L Int6 + SmearGate + Batch Optimization (val_bpb=1.1400)

output.summary: 11L int6 model with SmearGate/BigramHash widens MLP, cuts batch tokens to squeeze more steps in 10‑min training while batched sliding eval keeps stride=64 viable.
techniques: Int6 per-row quantized attention/MLP with int8 embedding
SmearGate + BigramHash on OrthoInit base with SWA checkpoints
Smaller 524K-token batches to maximize steps in fixed-time training
